name: Fushi No Tori
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>不</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>死</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>シ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>之</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ノ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ト</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鳥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>リ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card cannot be Special Summoned. This card returns to the owner's hand during the End Phase of the turn that this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up. When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points, increase your Life Points by an amount equal to the Battle Damage.
flavor: This card cannot be Special Summoned. This card returns to the owner's hand during the End Phase of the turn that this card is Normal Summoned or flipped face-up. When this card inflicts Battle Damage to your opponent's Life Points, increase your Life Points by an amount equal to the Battle Damage.

action: Activates during the turn in which it was Normal Summoned
Returns itself from field to hand
Activates if battle damage is inflicted
